text: Some think that the word ‘Benjamin’ has been inserted here by mistake; neither Zabulon nor Dan is represented in this list of the Israelite clans, whereas Benjamin’s descendants are traced at the beginning of chapter 8.

In verses 13-19 it seems likely that there has been some disturbance in the text here; the whole passage is disjointed and obscure, and it looks as if the names Happhim and Saphan, in verse 15, had crept in by mistake from verse 12 above.
The name Helem seems doubtful: cf. verse 32 above.
